summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG Premium Features: Multi-tenant B2B selector, Column Presets, and Dark Mode toggle. All 10 test cases passed: Login flow, Assets page navigation, Multi-tenant selector with dropdown (LOGITRAK, CLIENT01), tenant filtering effect on assets, Column config button with 3 presets (Vue complète, Vue standard, Vue simple), 12 column toggles, preset effect on list view (Vue complète: 10 cols, Vue simple: 3 cols), Dark mode toggle activation, Reports page in dark mode, and Light mode toggle restoration.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

passed_tests: 1. Login flow: /auth with admin/user@1234 - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
2. Navigate to Assets page /view/engin/index - page loads with 500 assets
3. Multi-tenant selector visible at top showing 'Tous les clients'
4. Tenant dropdown opens with 'Tous les clients', 'LOGITRAK', 'CLIENT01' options
5. Selecting LOGITRAK filters assets (shows 0 engin - no matching assets)
6. Returning to 'Tous les clients' shows all 500 assets
7. Column config button 'Colonnes' visible in toolbar
8. Column config panel shows 3 presets: Vue complète, Vue standard, Vue simple
9. Column config panel shows 12 column toggles (image, reference, label, zone, battery, etat, status, lastSeen, client, famille, tag, vin)
10. 'Vue complète' preset shows 10 columns in list view
11. 'Vue simple' preset shows 3 columns in list view (Asset, Zone, État)
12. Dark mode toggle visible in sidebar bottom showing 'Mode sombre'
13. Clicking toggle activates dark mode - html gets 'lt-dark' class
14. Toggle text changes to 'Mode clair' when dark mode is active
15. Reports page loads correctly in dark mode with 3-panel builder
16. Clicking toggle again restores light mode
17. Assets card view displays 15 cards per page with images
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumLayout.jsx: Tenant selector bar implemented with proper data-testid attributes (tenant-selector, tenant-dropdown, tenant-all, tenant-opt-{i})
PremiumAssets.jsx: Column presets (COLUMN_DEFS, PRESETS) with localStorage persistence working correctly
PremiumSidebar.jsx: Dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence and html class toggle working
logitag-dark.css: Comprehensive dark mode CSS covering all components (sidebar, cards, lists, modals, reports)
Tenant filtering uses client-side filtering via useLayoutCtx() context - filters by customername or IDCustomer
Column visibility persisted to localStorage with key 'lt-asset-cols'
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1-P3 features tested and working: Multi-tenant B2B selector (data-testid='tenant-selector'), Column presets (data-testid='col-config-btn', 'col-preset-complete/default/simple'), Dark mode toggle (data-testid='sidebar-dark-toggle'). External API is slow (10-20 sec) - always wait 8-12 seconds after navigation. Tenant filtering works client-side. Column presets persist to localStorage.

multi_tenant_b2b.filtering: Client-side filtering by customername or IDCustomer
